items.title: Trava Project
items.description: Trava is a comprehensive Task Management and Team Collaboration System designed to streamline project workflows.
items.overview: Trava is a multi-workspace task management system. I developed this project to explore Clean Architecture and modern web technologies, focusing on high scalability and a smooth user experience for team collaboration.

backend: Built with .NET 8 using Clean Architecture and CQRS via MediatR.
Implements JWT for security and role-based authorization.
Integrates PostgreSQL for persistence and Redis for performance optimization.
Applied Repository Pattern, Unit of Work, and Rate Limiting.
frontend: Single-page application built with Angular and TailwindCSS.
Complex state management for tasks and real-time UI updates.
Integrated PrimeNG components for a rich user interface.
Implemented Authentication Guards and HTTP Interceptors.

items.title: PhyGen Project
items.description: Phygen is an AI-Powered Physics Exam Generator System that helps teachers create exams automatically.
items.overview: Phygen leverages AI to automate the creation of physics exams for high school students. It supports custom difficulty levels and topic selection, generating high-quality questions and detailed explanations instantly.

backend: Developed using .NET 8 with Clean Architecture and CQRS.
Integrated ChatGPT and Gemini APIs for AI content generation.
Designed structured prompt workflows and content validation.
Utilized Redis caching for performance optimization.
frontend: Dynamic React-based SPA with interactive interface.
Managed complex authentication flows and API integrations.

items.title: TimeSwap Project
items.description: TimeSwap is a Time Exchange and Job Marketplace Platform connecting users for skill sharing and services.
items.overview: TimeSwap creates a marketplace where users can exchange services using a 'time' currency. It includes robust job listing, search, and application systems with an integrated E-Wallet for secure transactions.

backend: Implements a secure job management system and E-Wallet ledger.
Integrated ChatGPT for job assistance features.
Deployed on DigitalOcean with automated workflows.
frontend: Angular 18 SPA with Google Maps integration.
Features modern authentication flows and responsive profile management.
Real-time job discovery and application tracking.
mobile: Native Android app built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose (MVVM).
Features an AI chatbot for user assistance.
Integrated Google Maps API for location-based features.

items.title: Adobe Migration Project
items.description: A large-scale content migration project for an enterprise client using Adobe Experience Manager (AEM).
items.overview: This project involved migrating and validating thousands of landing pages from legacy CMS platforms to Adobe Experience Manager. I ensured structural integrity and content consistency across global enterprise environments.

backend: Worked extensively with AEM Content Fragments and components.
Validated landing pages for data accuracy and consistency.
Followed strictly governed Agile workflows for enterprise deployment.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in a large-scale project.
